on

Banyana Banyana head coach Desiree Ellis has announced a 29-player squad for the team’s 2024 Olympic Games final qualifying round fixture against the Super Falcons of Nigeria.

The African champions will open camp for the two fixtures on Monday, March 25.

The squad will be pared down to 23 players later this month.

Nigeria will host the first leg at the Moshood Abiola Stadium, Abuja, on Friday, April 5.

The venue for the reverse fixture will be announced in the coming days by the South Africa Football Association, SAFA.

The overall winners will earn a berth at the Paris 2024 Olympic Games.
